mapper.select: select id, dict_code, dict_label, dict_value, sort_order, status, created_at from sys_dict where dict_code = #{dictCode} and status = 1 order by sort_order, id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dict (dict_code, dict_label, dict_value, sort_order, status) values (#{dictCode}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: update sys_dict set dict_code = #{dictCode}, dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
